_comment: RAT scheduler/v1 conformance vectors. Drives Schedule/Cancel/WatchDue. at_unix_ms_offset is relative to the harness's 'now' (ms): negative = the one-shot is already due and should fire on WatchDue; positive = future, should NOT fire. Cancelled triggers never fire. expect_due is the exact set WatchDue must yield. The reference fires every due/not-cancelled/not-yet-fired one-shot then completes the stream (at-least-once per scheduler.proto).
